textPlain: Don't wanna be killjoy, but specifically since "sleek" and "native" is mentioned many times, I'd say that's not what one expects from a sleek macOS application to say the least.I'd expect something like Cyberduck quality UI, as an example. The author should aim to mimick system UI in my opinion as closely as possible (or integrate inside Finder).
The CLAUDE.md file is right there, so they are probably using agentic coding.But why does it matter? Does the app not work? I don't have a Mac, can't check.
